title: Fiscora — Accounting Firm
description: A modern, precise and reliable accounting firm dedicated to your company's performance.

Hero.heading: Accounting precision, built for your growth
Hero.subheading: Fiscora supports business owners and companies with rigorous accounting, tax and financial expertise — so every decision rests on accurate numbers.

About.heading: Rigorous accounting expertise, built for your performance
About.body: Since our founding, we've supported business owners and companies with a rigorous and human approach. Our mission: turn your accounting and tax obligations into a real driver of decision-making.
points: A dedicated point of contact at every step

Services.heading: Complete support, at every stage
Services.subheading: From bookkeeping to strategic advisory, we cover the full range of your company's financial needs.

descriptions.accounting: Bookkeeping, review and annual statements, with precise tracking of your activity.
descriptions.tax-advisory: A clear tax strategy to optimize your decisions, fully within the law.
descriptions.payroll: Payslips, social filings and contract management, fully compliant.
descriptions.business-creation: Choosing your legal structure and handling formalities for a smooth start.
descriptions.audit: Independent audit engagements to secure your accounts.
descriptions.financial-consulting: Financial analysis and steering to prepare your strategic decisions.
descriptions.legal-assistance: Legal support to secure your decisions and contracts.

WhyChooseUs.heading: An approach built for demanding business owners
WhyChooseUs.subheading: We combine technical rigor with real availability to offer tailored support.

items.title: Precision first
items.description: Every figure is checked with the same rigor, whatever the size of your company.

items.title: One dedicated contact
items.description: You always speak with the same person, who knows your business in depth.

items.title: Modern tools
items.description: Simple, secure access to your documents and indicators, anytime.

items.title: Real availability
items.description: We respond quickly, without unnecessary jargon or long delays.

Industries.heading: Expertise built for your industry
Industries.subheading: Every industry has its own accounting and tax challenges. We know them.

Numbers.heading: Measurable results
Numbers.subheading: Our clients' trust, translated into numbers.

items.quote: Fiscora transformed how we manage our accounting. We finally have a clear view of our performance, month after month.
items.name: Claire Dubreuil

items.quote: Rigorous support that's always available. Our accountant knows our business as well as we do.
items.name: Julien Marchand

items.quote: Switching to Fiscora let us secure our audits and save valuable time every quarter.
items.name: Sophie Lemoine
